knowledge_entry: BTC/USD HFT: 92% confidence insufficient; require 95%+ or volatility-adjusted entry gate to reduce false reversals.
adjustment: Raise momentum confidence threshold from 0.92 to 0.95 for BTC/USD HFT entries, or add volatility regime filter to reject high-confidence signals during elevated realized volatility.

knowledge_entry: SOL/USD HFT entries at 0.90+ confidence without multi-indicator confirmation have 60%+ failure rate in sub-1min holds.
adjustment: Reduce momentum confidence threshold for SOL/USD from 0.92 to 0.85; require 2+ corroborating indicators before entry at >0.90 confidence.

knowledge_entry: ETH/USD hft-sniper: 92% confidence predictions have insufficient edge; require 95%+ or reduce leverage.
adjustment: Raise signal confidence threshold from 0.92 to 0.95 for ETH/USD in hft-sniper strategy, or reduce position size by 50% when confidence is 0.90–0.94.

knowledge_entry: hft-sniper: 99% confidence on ETH/USD does not guarantee directional accuracy; add volatility regime filter before ultra-high confidence entries.
adjustment: Reduce maximum signal confidence acceptance threshold from 0.99 to 0.85 for hft-sniper on ETH/USD; require ensemble confirmation above 0.90 confidence.

knowledge_entry: SOL/USD: 99% confidence signals in hft-sniper are unreliable; cap confidence threshold at 0.85 to reduce false positives.
adjustment: Reduce maximum signal confidence acceptance threshold from 0.99 to 0.85 for SOL/USD in hft-sniper strategy to avoid over-reliance on extreme confidence scores.

knowledge_entry: HFT-sniper 99% confidence calls on BTC/USD show poor predictive power at ultra-short horizons; cap confidence at 0.85 for this symbol.
adjustment: Reduce maximum allowable signal_confidence threshold for BTC/USD entries from 0.99 to 0.85; require ensemble confirmation for confidence >0.90.
